calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-28-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, August 27, 2015 in Department 525:
Charles Smith, investigator, appears for Respondent/Plaintiff S.F. Tax Collector - Investigation Unit.
Mohammed Ahmed Ali, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn. Mr. Smith testifies on behalf of SF Tax Collector - Investigation Unit and responds to the questions from the Court. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit - copy of SFMTA administrative citation, Notice, and transportation law code.

Defendant/Appellant, Mr. Ali testifies on his own behalf and responds to the questions from the Court.
Mr. Ali informed the Court that his first name has been misspelled; Court Noted and clerk have corrected his first name on the record.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tem David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Judgment Entered
